What is Alon? A tree. A very solid one.

The name "Alon" is a Greek word that can refer to a tree. In Greek mythology, it was the name of the god of the underworld who was said to be a very strong and durable being. Alon is often associated with a sense of power and might, and it is often used in the Free mason tradition to represent the god of strength and power.
